'''âr-f-b''' ('''karafab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ebonise|ebonise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-f-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ebonise|ebonise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-f-b
|-
! Lemma
| karafab
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirafab|thirafab]] || [[word:jirafab|jirafab]] || [[word:shirafab|shirafab]] || [[word:kirafab|kirafab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurafab|thuthurafab]] || [[word:jujurafab|jujurafab]] || [[word:shushurafab|shushurafab]] || [[word:kukurafab|kukurafab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thurafab|thurafab]] || [[word:jurafab|jurafab]] || [[word:shurafab|shurafab]] || [[word:kurafab|kurafab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thurafab|thurafab]] || [[word:jurafab|jurafab]] || [[word:shurafab|shurafab]] || [[word:kurafab|kurafab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:therafab|therafab]] || [[word:jerafab|jerafab]] || [[word:sherafab|sherafab]] || [[word:kerafab|kerafab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothorafab|thothorafab]] || [[word:jojorafab|jojorafab]] || [[word:shoshorafab|shoshorafab]] || [[word:kokorafab|kokorafab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorafab|thorafab]] || [[word:jorafab|jorafab]] || [[word:shorafab|shorafab]] || [[word:korafab|korafab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorafab|thorafab]] || [[word:jorafab|jorafab]] || [[word:shorafab|shorafab]] || [[word:korafab|korafab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠrafab|thĂŠrafab]] || [[word:jĂŠrafab|jĂŠrafab]] || [[word:shĂŠrafab|shĂŠrafab]] || [[word:kĂŠrafab|kĂŠrafab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharafab|thatharafab]] || [[word:jajarafab|jajarafab]] || [[word:shasharafab|shasharafab]] || [[word:kakarafab|kakarafab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharafab|tharafab]] || [[word:jarafab|jarafab]] || [[word:sharafab|sharafab]] || [[word:karafab|karafab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharafab|tharafab]] || [[word:jarafab|jarafab]] || [[word:sharafab|sharafab]] || [[word:karafab|karafab]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:sharafab|sharafab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosharafab|gosharafab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisharafab|gokisharafab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:sharafabnĂŒ|sharafabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosharafabnknĂŒ|gosharafabnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisharafabnĂŒ|gokisharafabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sharafabshĂ«|sharafabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosharafabnkshĂ«|gosharafabnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisharafabshĂ«|gokisharafabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharafabro|sharafabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharafabnkro|gosharafabnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharafabro|gokisharafabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sharafabmu|sharafabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharafabnkmu|gosharafabnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharafabmu|gokisharafabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sharafabsher|sharafabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosharafabnksher|gosharafabnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisharafabsher|gokisharafabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:sharafabng|sharafabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosharafabnkng|gosharafabnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisharafabng|gokisharafabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:sharafabya|sharafabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosharafabnkya|gosharafabnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisharafabya|gokisharafabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sharafabyam|sharafabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosharafabnkyam|gosharafabnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisharafabyam|gokisharafabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharafabnĂŒshĂ«|sharafabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharafabnknĂŒshĂ«|gosharafabnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharafabnĂŒshĂ«|gokisharafabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharafabnĂŒro|sharafabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharafabnknĂŒro|gosharafabnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharafabnĂŒro|gokisharafabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharafabnĂŒmu|sharafabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharafabnknĂŒmu|gosharafabnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharafabnĂŒmu|gokisharafabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharafabshĂ«nĂŒ|sharafabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharafabnkshĂ«nĂŒ|gosharafabnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharafabshĂ«nĂŒ|gokisharafabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharafabshĂ«ro|sharafabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharafabnkshĂ«ro|gosharafabnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharafabshĂ«ro|gokisharafabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharafabshĂ«mu|sharafabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharafabnkshĂ«mu|gosharafabnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharafabshĂ«mu|gokisharafabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharafabronĂŒ|sharafabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharafabnkronĂŒ|gosharafabnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharafabronĂŒ|gokisharafabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharafabroshĂ«|sharafabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharafabnkroshĂ«|gosharafabnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharafabroshĂ«|gokisharafabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharafabromu|sharafabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharafabnkromu|gosharafabnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharafabromu|gokisharafabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharafabmunĂŒ|sharafabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharafabnkmunĂŒ|gosharafabnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharafabmunĂŒ|gokisharafabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharafabmushĂ«|sharafabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharafabnkmushĂ«|gosharafabnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharafabmushĂ«|gokisharafabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharafabmuro|sharafabmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharafabnkmuro|gosharafabnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharafabmuro|gokisharafabmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
